options: Investigate the underlying metrics and system health

options: Prometheus collects and stores metrics, while Grafana visualizes and analyzes them
Grafana collects metrics and Prometheus creates dashboards
Both tools perform the same function
questions.correctAnswer: Prometheus collects and stores metrics, while Grafana visualizes and analyzes them

quizTitle: Metrics, Logs, Traces — Topic Quiz

questions.question: A DevOps engineer wants to monitor CPU utilization of a production server over the last 24 hours. Which observability data type is most suitable for this purpose?
Your application suddenly starts throwing 'Database Connection Failed' errors. Which observability data type would provide detailed error messages to help investigate the issue?
A user reports that a request is taking 10 seconds to complete. You need to identify which service in a microservices architecture is causing the delay. Which observability data type is most useful?
Which of the following is an example of a Metric?
options: User login failed due to invalid password

questions.question: Which of the following is an example of a Log entry?
options: ERROR: Unable to connect to database
questions.correctAnswer: ERROR: Unable to connect to database

questions.question: Which statement best describes a Trace in a distributed application?
options: A collection of system resource statistics
A record of events generated by applications
The complete journey of a request across multiple services
questions.correctAnswer: The complete journey of a request across multiple services

questions.question: Your monitoring dashboard shows that API response time has increased significantly. What should you check next to understand the root cause?

A production application consists of multiple microservices. One service is causing slow responses, but it is unclear which one. Which observability component helps identify the exact service responsible?
A DevOps team wants to know how many requests per second their application is handling. Which observability data type provides this information most effectively?
Which statement best describes the relationship between Metrics, Logs, and Traces in modern observability?
options: They provide different views of system health and work together for troubleshooting
Logs are the only required observability data
Traces are used only for security
questions.correctAnswer: They provide different views of system health and work together for troubleshooting

quizTitle: Incident Response, AIOps — Topic Quiz

questions.question: A production application suddenly becomes unavailable and customers are unable to access the service. What is the first step in a typical incident response process?

options: The process of detecting, responding to, and resolving service disruptions

questions.question: A monitoring system detects that a web server is down and automatically notifies the operations team. Which phase of incident response is being demonstrated?

options: Investigate the root cause of the issue
questions.correctAnswer: Investigate the root cause of the issue

questions.question: After resolving a major outage, the team conducts a meeting to analyze what happened and how similar incidents can be prevented. What is this activity called?
A database service crashes unexpectedly. The monitoring system automatically restarts the service without human intervention. This is an example of:
What does AIOps stand for?
The primary goal of AIOps is to:
options: Use AI and machine learning to improve IT operations
questions.correctAnswer: Use AI and machine learning to improve IT operations

questions.question: A company collects thousands of logs every minute. An AIOps platform analyzes the logs and identifies unusual patterns before an outage occurs. What capability is being demonstrated?
An AIOps system detects abnormal memory consumption and predicts a service failure before users are impacted. What is the main benefit of this approach?

Which of the following tasks can be enhanced by AIOps?
A company wants to reduce alert fatigue by automatically grouping related alerts into a single incident. Which AIOps capability helps achieve this?

options: AIOps helps detect, analyze, and resolve incidents faster through automation and intelligence
Incident Response is only used when AIOps fails
questions.correctAnswer: AIOps helps detect, analyze, and resolve incidents faster through automation and intelligence

questions.question: A production application generates thousands of log entries every minute. What is the primary benefit of using AI-powered log analysis instead of manually reviewing logs?
options: Faster identification of issues and patterns

quizTitle: SRE — SLIs, SLOs, Error Budgets — Topic Quiz

questions.question: What does SRE stand for in modern cloud and DevOps environments?
The primary goal of Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) is to:
options: Improve system reliability, scalability, and performance
questions.correctAnswer: Improve system reliability, scalability, and performance

questions.question: A company wants to measure the percentage of successful API requests served by its application. Which SRE concept is being used?
What does SLI stand for?
Which of the following is an example of an SLI?
options: Number of developers in the team

questions.question: An organization defines that its application should be available 99.9% of the time each month. Which SRE concept does this represent?
What does SLO stand for?
Which statement best describes an SLO?
options: A measurable target for service reliability or performance
A log generated by an application
questions.correctAnswer: A measurable target for service reliability or performance

questions.question: A company defines an SLO of 99.95% uptime. What is the purpose of setting such a target?
What is an Error Budget in SRE?
options: The budget allocated for cloud services
The amount of acceptable downtime or failure within an SLO target
questions.correctAnswer: The amount of acceptable downtime or failure within an SLO target

questions.question: A service has an SLO of 99.9% uptime. Which statement about its Error Budget is correct?
options: 0.1% downtime is acceptable within the defined period
The service does not require monitoring
questions.correctAnswer: 0.1% downtime is acceptable within the defined period

questions.question: A development team has exhausted its Error Budget due to multiple production incidents. What is the most appropriate action according to SRE practices?
options: Focus on reliability improvements before releasing more features
questions.correctAnswer: Focus on reliability improvements before releasing more features

questions.question: Which metric would be commonly used as an SLI for a web application?
A payment application has an SLO stating that 95% of transactions must complete within 2 seconds. Which aspect of reliability is being measured?
Which statement best describes the relationship between SLIs, SLOs, and Error Budgets?
options: SLIs measure performance, SLOs define targets, and Error Budgets define acceptable failure levels
questions.correctAnswer: SLIs measure performance, SLOs define targets, and Error Budgets define acceptable failure levels

quizTitle: Cost Optimization, Production Readiness Reviews — Topic Quiz

questions.question: A company notices that several EC2 instances are running continuously even though they are only needed during business hours. Which cost optimization action would be most effective?
options: Schedule instances to stop when not in use
questions.correctAnswer: Schedule instances to stop when not in use

questions.question: What is the primary goal of cloud cost optimization?
options: Reduce costs while maintaining performance and reliability
questions.correctAnswer: Reduce costs while maintaining performance and reliability

questions.question: A development environment has been idle for several weeks but is still generating cloud costs. What should a DevOps engineer do?
options: Review and remove or shut down unused resources
questions.correctAnswer: Review and remove or shut down unused resources

questions.question: Which cloud resource is commonly reviewed first when looking for opportunities to reduce infrastructure costs?
A company is paying for a large EC2 instance, but monitoring shows that CPU utilization rarely exceeds 15%. What cost optimization recommendation is most appropriate?
options: Right-size the instance to a smaller type
questions.correctAnswer: Right-size the instance to a smaller type

questions.question: Before deploying a new application to production, the engineering team performs a review to ensure scalability, security, monitoring, and reliability requirements are met. What is this process called?
Which of the following areas is commonly evaluated during a Production Readiness Review?

options: Complete monitoring and alerting setup before production release
questions.correctAnswer: Complete monitoring and alerting setup before production release

questions.question: Why is a Production Readiness Review important before launching a critical application?
options: It helps identify risks and operational gaps before users are impacted
It eliminates the need for documentation
questions.correctAnswer: It helps identify risks and operational gaps before users are impacted

questions.question: Which statement best combines the goals of Cost Optimization and Production Readiness Reviews?
options: Build systems that are reliable, secure, observable, and cost-efficient before going live
Reduce all cloud costs regardless of performance impact
questions.correctAnswer: Build systems that are reliable, secure, observable, and cost-efficient before going live
